heading: Office of Advocacy within Small Business Administration; Chief Counsel for Advocacy
label: 634a Office of Advocacy within Small Business Administration; Chief Counsel for Advocacy
text: There is established within the Small Business Administration an Office of Advocacy. The management of the Office shall be vested in a Chief Counsel for Advocacy who shall be appointed from civilian life by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate.
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Small Business Act which comprises this chapter.
